headline.text: L3 MFM foreign material found in *WIP boxes* — no investigation or disposition documented in window.

summary: One open FM event at L3 MFM with no closure details. Five active holds across L1 and L2: wrong pallet type (6 pallets), exposed caramel (9 pallets), missing labels, and continuing ingredient hold. Near-miss at L1 S3 — QA tag read 'rework' instead of 'hold,' nearly released product to pack.

holds.title: 3 LPNs — sealing malfunction, pouches open
holds.summary: Last pallets from second shift S3 line left with open seals due to machine fault.
holds.status: Resolved on shift — sealing completed and released to production.

holds.title: Pallets missing labels — S3 rework
holds.summary: Third shift PRS pallets missing final labels; second shift rework in progress.
holds.status: Resolved on shift — rework completed and released to production by 22:13 MT.

holds.title: 9 pallets — exposed caramel cracking
holds.summary: PRS Pecan Clusters jars showing caramel quality issue; retention tags attached and hold confirmed in system.
holds.status: On hold — retention tags attached, disposition pending QA review.

holds.title: 6 pallets — wrong pallet type used
holds.summary: Second shift S2 line packed 6 pallets of 6.7oz pouches onto new pallets instead of PECO pallets per spec; all staged on S4 for rework Thursday.
holds.status: On hold — staged on S4 awaiting PECO pallet delivery Thursday 7/27 for rework.

holds.title: 130 lbs Graham ingredient — continuing hold
holds.summary: Partial box from previous hold; 330 lbs consumed from unaffected portion, 130 lbs remains on hold for review.
holds.status: On hold — 130 lbs isolated pending QA disposition; unaffected material consumed.

food_safety.title: Foreign material in WIP boxes
food_safety.summary: FM found in work-in-process boxes on MFM line at 23:25 MT; no details on material type, quantity affected, or investigation documented.
food_safety.status: Open — no disposition, investigation update, or affected product quantity reported by window close.

quality.title: Near-miss — hold tag read 'rework'
quality.summary: PRS dark chocolate pecans from last week had QA tag incorrectly labeled 'rework' instead of 'hold'; team nearly packed off before catch.
quality.status: Resolved — product remained on hold, tags corrected during shift.

quality.title: 4 bins of doubles on Truffle line
quality.summary: High rate of double pieces coming out of enrober; 4 bins accumulated by 06:46 MT first shift.
quality.status: Open — accumulation ongoing at window close, no corrective action documented.

sanitation.title: S3 C2 belt — Level 4 cleaning
sanitation.summary: Significant chocolate buildup under C2 belt guides requires disassembly and deep clean; white plastic strips must be removed for proper access.
sanitation.status: In progress — maintenance confirmed strips removal required, team working with Caleb York during second shift.

opportunities.text: Review hold tag process and training — based on S3 near-miss where 'rework' tag on hold product nearly released pallets to pack.
Consider pallet type verification step in S2 pack-off checklist — based on 6 pallets packed onto wrong pallet type (new vs. PECO per spec).
Consider adding WIP container inspection checkpoint to MFM startup checklist — based on FM found in WIP boxes with no documented source or investigation protocol.
